verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Worship the Lord, In His presence we stand. He cares for you And He understands. Come Holy Spirit And speak to us now, Grace, joy and peace And love abound.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is Worthy, Worthy, Worthy, Worthy is the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is Mighty, Mighty, Mighty, Mighty is the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He is Holy, Holy, Holy, Holy is the Lord.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He is Faithful, Faithful, Faithful, Faithful is the Lord.
